category: Pans Designed for Conventional Oven Use
explanation: All items except the Toaster are specific types of pans or tins designed to hold food while baking or roasting inside a conventional oven. A toaster is a separate appliance that cooks food with radiant heat and does not go inside an oven.

category: Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: The Pyramids of Giza, Colossus of Rhodes, Hanging Gardens of Babylon, and Lighthouse of Alexandria are all traditionally listed among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Acropolis of Athens, while an iconic ancient site, is not one of the Seven Wonders.

METER, KILOGRAM, SECOND, and AMPERE are all SI Base Units, which are the fundamental units of measurement in the International System of Units. JOULE, however, is a derived SI unit for energy, meaning it is expressed as a combination of base units.
